## Description

Brief description of the task to complete.

## Parent Issue

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Sprint Info

- **Sprint:** [e.g., sprint-2]
- **Priority:** [P0 / P1 / P2 / P3]
- **Estimated effort:** [small / medium / large]

## Checklist

- [ ] Implementation complete
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Reviewed and approved

## Notes

Any relevant technical details, links, or context.
